scenarios.description: sourceRange() delegates to parent.sourceRange(key) when parent is non-null
scenarios.precondition: Attributes stub with non-null parent implementing sourceRange(String)
scenarios.expectedResult: returns the exact AttributeRange instance provided by stubParent.sourceRange(key)
pseudocode: TEST TC02 sourceRange delegates to parent
// Arrange: stub Attributes to return a known range
Range.AttributeRange fakeRange = new Range.AttributeRange(new Range.Position(1), new Range.Position(2));
// Assert: should be the same instance from stubParent
